name: Pharaoh's Requiem
description: Notes This is a defense-oriented lute. It is currently one of two items able to consistently apply Weak, which reduces enemy attack damage by 10%. This can seem small, but can make a difference with endgame enemies that may inflict hundreds of damage per shot.
effects: Party Effect: Within 4.5 squares Inspired for 4 seconds. Pharaoh’s Wrath: Summons a Pharaoh’s Mask on the cursors location that inflicts Weak for 3 secs within 3 squares every 1 sec.
Pharaoh’s Ward: Upon taking at least 50 damage, protects you with Armored on Self for 3 secs. Inflicts Weak on enemies for 5 secs within 5 squares. Pharaoh’s Ward Cooldown: 15 seconds
